zh.lifeSummary: 當Johanna Clopton於大約1370年出生在英國諾薩普頓史爾可洛普頓時，她的父親William d' Clopton35歲，母親Ivetta Grey31歲。她和John Cavendish至少有5個兒子。她去世於1402年之後在英國素福爾可克萊爾。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Johanna Clopton于大约1370年出生在英国諾薩普頓史爾可洛普頓时，她的父亲William d' Clopton35岁，母亲Ivetta Grey31岁。她和John Cavendish至少有5个儿子。她去世于1402年之后在英国素福爾可克萊爾。

nameMeanings.name: Clopton
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English: habitational name from any of various places, for examplein Essex, Suffolk, and Warwickshire, named Clopton from Old Englishclopp(a) ‘rock, hill’ + tūn ‘settlement’.

nameMeanings.name: Johanna
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.

variants.name: Jane
meanings: Originally a feminine form of John , from the Old French form Je(h)anne. Since the 17th century it has proved the most popular of the feminine forms of John, ahead of Joan and Jean . It now also commonly occurs as the second element in combinations such as Sarah-Jane. In Britain it is still one of the most frequent of all girls' names. It is not a royal name, but was borne by the tragic Lady Jane Grey ( 1537–54 ), who was unwillingly proclaimed queen in 1553 , deposed nine days later, and executed the following year. Seventy years earlier, the name had come into prominence as that of Jane Shore , mistress of King Edward IV and subsequently of Thomas Grey , 1st Marquess of Dorset, Lady Jane's grandfather. Jane Shore's tribulations in 1483 at the hands of Richard III , Edward's brother and successor, became the subject of popular ballads and plays, which may well have increased the currency of the name in the 16th century. A 19th-century influence was its use as the name of the central character in Charlotte Brontë's novel Jane Eyre ( 1847 ). From 1932 to 1959 it was used as the name of a cheerful and scantily clad beauty whose adventures were chronicled in a strip cartoon in the Daily Mirror. It is also borne by the American film stars Jane Russell ( 1921–2011 ) and Jane Fonda ( b. 1937 ).

historicEvents.title: Wycliffe's Bible
historicEvents.description: John Wycliffe, English theologian and professor at the University of Oxford, completed a translation of the Bible from the Latin Vulgate into Middle English. This translation is known as Wycliffe's Bible and was completed around 1382.

en.lifeSummary: When Johanna Clopton was born about 1370, in Clopton, Northamptonshire, England, her father, William d' Clopton, was 35 and her mother, Ivetta Grey, was 31. She had at least 5 sons with John Cavendish. She died after 1402, in Clare, Suffolk, England.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Johanna Clopton est née environ 1370, à Clopton, Northamptonshire, Angleterre, son père, William d' Clopton, avait 35 ans et sa mère, Ivetta Grey, avait 31 ans. Elle a eu au moins 5 fils avec John Cavendish. Elle est décédée après 1402, à Clare, Suffolk, Angleterre.

de.lifeSummary: Als Johanna Clopton um 1370 in Clopton, Northamptonshire, England geboren wurde, war ihr Vater William d' Clopton 35 und ihre Mutter Ivetta Grey 31. Sie hatte mit John Cavendish mindestens 5 Söhne. Sie starb nach 1402 in Clare, Suffolk, England.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Johanna Clopton è nata il circa 1370 nel Clopton, Northamptonshire, England, sua padre, William d' Clopton, aveva 35 anni e sua madre, Ivetta Grey, aveva 31 anni. Lei avuto almeno 5 figli con John Cavendish. Morì dopo il 1402, nel Clare, Suffolk, England.

ja.lifeSummary: Johanna Cloptonが約1370年にイギリスノーサンプトンシュアイアクロプトンで生まれた時，父William d' Cloptonは35歳，母Ivetta Greyは31歳であった。彼女はJohn Cavendishとの間に少なくとも5人の息子をもうけた。彼女は1402年以後にイギリススフォルククラーで死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Johanna Clopton(이)가 대략 1370년 영국 노르섬프토실르 클로프턴에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 William d' Clopton(은)는 35세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Ivetta Grey(은)는 31세였다. 그녀는 John Cavendish(와)과 적어도 다섯 명의 아들을 두었다. 그녀는 1402년 이후 영국 수폴크 클래르에서 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Johanna Clopton nasceu aproximadamente 1370, em Clopton, Northamptonshire, Inglaterra, seu pai, William d' Clopton, tinha 35 anos e sua mãe, Ivetta Grey, tinha 31 anos. Ela teve pelo menos 5 filhos com John Cavendish. Ela faleceu após 1402, em Clare, Suffolk, Inglaterra.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Johanna Clopton родилась около 1370 г. в местности клоптон, нортамптоншир, Англия, её отцу по имени William d' Clopton было 35 лет, а матери, которую звали Ivetta Grey, 31. У неё было по крайней мере 5 сыновей от John Cavendish. Она умерла после 1402 г. в местности клар, суффолк, Англия.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Johanna Clopton nació aproximadamente 1370, en Clopton, Northamptonshire, Inglaterra, su papá, William d' Clopton, tenía 35 años y su mamá, Ivetta Grey, tenía 31 años. Tuvo por lo menos 5 hijos con John Cavendish. Murió después de 1402, en Clare, Suffolk, Inglaterra.
